title: AIEOS CI spec v1
description: A frozen CI spec authored by the Engineering Execution kit. Declares which taxonomy actions run, their dependencies, tool-agnostic success criteria, and global policies. Action instances reference the frozen action taxonomy; criteria and dependency graphs are evaluated by the pipeline runner's spec validator.

spec_version.description: Semantic version of this spec document.

code_repo.description: Target code repository reference — owner/name or full URL.

actions.description: Action instances to run. Each references a taxonomy action, declares its success criteria, and declares its dependency set. The graph implied by depends_on must be a DAG (enforced by the pipeline runner's spec validator).

action.description: Taxonomy action identifier — must match an entry in taxonomy/actions-v1.md.

criteria.description: Tool-agnostic success criteria evaluated by the run validator against canonical findings.

depends_on.description: Action identifiers of upstream dependencies within this spec. Must form a DAG.

adapter_preferences.description: Optional project-level adapter preferences keyed by action identifier. Values are adapter identifiers.
